# Datacendia

> **Datacendia is Decision Crisis Immunization Infrastructure.** We created a new category: the evidentiary layer that proves AI decisions were made correctly when challenged years later under adversarial scrutiny. Built on 9 primitives that prevent institutional failure.

## The Category: Decision Crisis Immunization Infrastructure (DCII)

Datacendia replaces unstructured decision-making (email chains, meetings, hallway conversations) with AI-governed deliberation. Multiple AI agents debate decisions from different perspectives — CFO, Risk, Legal, Ethics, Strategy — then produce a cryptographically sealed evidence packet proving how and why the decision was made. This packet is tamper-proof, designed to support evidentiary standards, and regulator-ready. Sovereign deployment (on-premises, private cloud, air-gapped) ensures data never leaves your infrastructure.

## The Positioning: Crisis Immunization

Crisis Immunization is the framework that makes organizations structurally immune to decision crises. It consists of 9 primitives — each mapped to a dimension of the Institutional Immune System Score (IISS):

1. **Discovery-Time Proof** — Prove *when* you knew what you knew. Cryptographically timestamped with RFC 3161 external authorities.
2. **Deliberation Capture** — Record the full reasoning: every argument, every trade-off, every vote. Not just the outcome.
3. **Override Accountability** — When humans overrule the AI, the override is logged, justified, and tracked to outcome.
4. **Continuity Memory** — Institutional knowledge that survives leadership transitions. "A similar decision was made in 2019 — the dissenters were right."
5. **Drift Detection** — Detect when decisions deviate from established policy before the deviation becomes a crisis.
6. **Cognitive Bias Mitigation** — Detect 24 cognitive biases in deliberation transcripts. Flag anchoring, confirmation bias, groupthink, and sunk cost fallacy in real time with structured de-biasing interventions.
7. **Quantum-Resistant Integrity** — Post-quantum cryptographic signatures (Dilithium, SPHINCS+, Falcon) ensure evidence signed today remains verifiable in 2040+ when quantum computers break RSA/ECDSA.
8. **Synthetic Media Authentication** — Prove digital evidence is authentic, not fabricated. C2PA provenance signing, chain-of-custody tracking, deepfake detection, and hardware attestation.
9. **Cross-Jurisdiction Compliance** — When GDPR says delete and China's PIPL says retain, detect regulatory conflicts across 17+ jurisdictions simultaneously and generate good-faith maximum compliance documentation.

## Core Products

- [The Council](https://datacendia.com/demos.html#cortex): Multi-agent AI deliberation engine. Your AI executive team debates every angle before you decide.
- [CendiaChronos](https://datacendia.com/demos.html#cortex): Organizational decision timeline with pivotal moment detection and temporal analysis.
- [Cascade Analysis](https://datacendia.com/demos.html#cortex): Maps 2nd and 3rd order ripple effects of decisions before you commit.
- [Ghost Board](https://datacendia.com/demos.html#cortex): AI board meeting rehearsal — practice presentations against AI directors.
- [Pre-Mortem Engine](https://datacendia.com/demos.html#cortex): Reverse-engineers failure modes before decisions are made.
- [CendiaDissent](https://datacendia.com/demos.html#cortex): Formal disagreement tracking with tamper-proof records and outcome monitoring.
- [CendiaCrucible](https://datacendia.com/demos.html#oversight): Adversarial red team stress testing from 8+ attack perspectives.
- [Audit Provenance](https://datacendia.com/demos.html#evidence): Cryptographically sealed decision packets with Merkle tree integrity and Ed25519 signatures.
- [QR Air-Gap Bridge](https://datacendia.com/demos.html#evidence): Zero-network data transfer via animated QR codes for air-gapped environments.

## Key Differentiators

- **Decision Crisis Immunization Infrastructure (DCII)**: The category. Nobody else owns it. We created it.
- **Crisis Immunization**: The framework. 9 primitives that prevent institutional failure. Reframes governance from "buy our tool" to "immunize yourself against the next scandal."
- **Sovereign Architecture**: Runs entirely on-premise. Zero cloud dependency. Air-gap capable.
- **Multi-Agent Deliberation**: Decisions stress-tested by 6+ AI agents with cross-examination.
- **Cryptographic Evidence**: Every decision sealed with Merkle trees and digital signatures.
- **Formal Dissent Protection**: Disagreement is preserved in tamper-proof records — never buried.
- **IISS Score**: Institutional Immune System Score — 0-1000 standardized resilience metric.
- **Regulatory Compliance**: SOC 2 aligned, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act Article 14, Basel III, HIPAA architecture-aligned, CMMC 2.0, FedRAMP control-ready, SR 11-7 model override documentation, Premier League PSR, UEFA CFSR.
- **205K+ Automated Tests**: Verified test suite across 228 test files (Feb 21, 2026).
- **8-Slot Multi-Model Architecture**: Purpose-built AI model per task type (reasoning, coder, vision, embed, etc.) — all running locally via Ollama. License tier gating controls which models each customer tier can access.

## 11 Sovereign Architectural Patterns

- **Data Diode**: Unidirectional data ingest with quarantine, ClamAV scanning, and signature verification.
- **Local RLHF**: Zero-cloud reinforcement learning from human feedback — no external data transfer.
- **Decision DNA**: One-click audit artifact export (PDF+JSON bundles with Merkle tree integrity).
- **Shadow Council**: Sandbox parallel deliberation mode for testing radical ideas without ledger.
- **Deterministic Replay**: Bit-perfect decision reproducibility with pinned random seeds and state capture.
- **QR Air-Gap Bridge**: Animated QR code sequences for zero-media air-gap data transfer.
- **Canary Tripwires**: Honeypot records for exfiltration detection with multiple canary types.
- **TPM Attestation**: Hardware-signed decisions via Trusted Platform Module (software fallback).
- **Time-Lock**: Cryptographic time-lock for embargoed decisions (RSA time-lock puzzles).
- **Federated Mesh**: Multi-site learning via sneakernet with differential privacy.
- **Portable Instance**: Bootable USB deployment configuration generator.

## Industry Verticals

- **Legal Governance**: AML/KYC compliance, PEP screening, OFAC sanctions, cross-jurisdiction harmonization. Deep-dive on verticals page.
- **Sports / Football Clubs**: Transfer governance, Premier League PSR monitoring, UEFA CFSR (squad cost ratio 70%), EFL FFP, FIFA Agent Regulations, wage-to-revenue drift detection, manager succession continuity. 8 specialized agents. Interactive transfer decision demo available. Everton PSR breach war game.
- **Financial Services**: SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12 model risk management, Basel III/IV capital adequacy, SOX §302/§404, BSA/AML, DORA. Override documentation for regulatory exams. SVB war game. Deep-dive on verticals page.
- **Healthcare**: Decision governance for patient safety — NOT a clinical decision support tool (does not fall under FDA CDS guidance, 21st Century Cures Act §3060). EHR integration (Epic, Cerner/Oracle Health, MEDITECH) via HL7 FHIR. Joint Commission sentinel event evidence. CMS CoP documentation. HIPAA/HITECH architecture-aligned. NHS maternity failures war game. Deep-dive on verticals page.
- **Government & Defense**: Sovereign, air-gapped deployment. FedRAMP Moderate control-ready. IL4/IL5 pathway documented. CMMC 2.0 Level 2/3 architecture-ready. CAGE Code available.
